000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;125    {
;;;126        uint8_t i, j;
;;;127        for (j = 0; j < 8; j++)
000002  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000004  e00e              B        |L2.36|
                  |L2.6|
;;;128        {
;;;129            OLED_SetCursor(j, 0);
000006  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000008  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;130            for (i = 0; i < 128; i++)
00000e  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000010  e004              B        |L2.28|
                  |L2.18|
;;;131            {
;;;132                OLED_WriteData(0x00);

000014  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData

00001a  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;130

00001c  2d80              CMP      r5,#0x80              ;130
00001e  dbf8              BLT      |L2.18|
000020  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;127
000022  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;127
                  |L2.36|
000024  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;127
000026  dbee              BLT      |L2.6|
;;;133            }
;;;134        }
;;;135    }

;;;136

                  OLED_DrawBMP PROC
;;;181    /***********功能描述：显示显示BMP图片128×64起始点坐标(x,y),x的范围0～127，y为页的范围0～7*****************/
;;;182    void OLED_DrawBMP(unsigned char x0, unsigned char y0, unsigned char x1, unsigned char y1, unsigned char PI[])
000000  e92d5ff0          PUSH     {r4-r12,lr}
;;;183    {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
00000a  4698              MOV      r8,r3
00000c  f8dda028          LDR      r10,[sp,#0x28]
;;;184        unsigned int j = 0;
000010  f04f0b00          MOV      r11,#0
;;;185        unsigned char x, y;
;;;186    
;;;187        for (y = y0; y < y1; y++)
000014  4635              MOV      r5,r6
000016  e014              B        |L3.66|
                  |L3.24|
;;;188        {
;;;189            OLED_SetCursor(y, x0);  //第一个设置y,第二个设置x//设置光标位置左上角(0,0) 往下0 - 7 ， 往右0 - 127
000018  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00001a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;190            for (x = x0; x < x1; x++)
000020  46a1              MOV      r9,r4
000022  e00a              B        |L3.58|
                  |L3.36|
;;;191            {
;;;192                OLED_WriteData(PI[j++]);      //写数据
000024  4659              MOV      r1,r11
000026  f10b0b01          ADD      r11,r11,#1
00002a  f81a0001          LDRB     r0,[r10,r1]
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData
000032  f1090001          ADD      r0,r9,#1              ;190
000036  f00009ff          AND      r9,r0,#0xff           ;190
                  |L3.58|
00003a  45b9              CMP      r9,r7                 ;190
00003c  dbf2              BLT      |L3.36|
00003e  1c68              ADDS     r0,r5,#1              ;187
000040  b2c5              UXTB     r5,r0                 ;187
                  |L3.66|
000042  4545              CMP      r5,r8                 ;187
000044  dbe8              BLT      |L3.24|
;;;193            }
;;;194        }
;;;195    }
000046  e8bd9ff0          POP      {r4-r12,pc}
;;;196    
                          ENDP

                  OLED_I2C_Init PROC
;;;8      /*引脚初始化*/
;;;9      void OLED_I2C_Init(void)
000000  b508              PUSH     {r3,lr}
;;;10     {
;;;11         GPIO_InitTypeDef GPIO_InitStructure;
;;;12         // 使能对应GPIO端口的时钟
;;;13         RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd(RCC_APB2Periph_GPIOB, ENABLE);
000002  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000004  2008              MOVS     r0,#8
000006  f7fffffe          BL       RCC_APB2PeriphClockCmd
;;;14     
;;;15         GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Mode = GPIO_Mode_Out_OD;
00000a  2014              MOVS     r0,#0x14
00000c  f88d0003          STRB     r0,[sp,#3]
;;;16         GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Speed = GPIO_Speed_50MHz;
000010  2003              MOVS     r0,#3
000012  f88d0002          STRB     r0,[sp,#2]
;;;17     
;;;18         // 初始化SCL引脚
;;;19         GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = OLED_I2C_SCL_PIN;
000016  f44f7080          MOV      r0,#0x100
00001a  f8ad0000          STRH     r0,[sp,#0]
;;;20         GPIO_Init(OLED_I2C_GPIO_PORT, &GPIO_InitStructure);
00001e  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000020  480a              LDR      r0,|L4.76|
000022  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_Init
;;;21     
;;;22         // 初始化SDA引脚
;;;23         GPIO_InitStructure.GPIO_Pin = OLED_I2C_SDA_PIN;
000026  f44f7000          MOV      r0,#0x200
00002a  f8ad0000          STRH     r0,[sp,#0]
;;;24         GPIO_Init(OLED_I2C_GPIO_PORT, &GPIO_InitStructure);
00002e  4669              MOV      r1,sp
000030  4806              LDR      r0,|L4.76|
000032  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_Init
;;;25     
;;;26         // 初始状态拉高SCL和SDA
;;;27         OLED_W_SCL(1);
000036  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000038  0211              LSLS     r1,r2,#8
00003a  4804              LDR      r0,|L4.76|
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
;;;28         OLED_W_SDA(1);
000040  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
000042  0251              LSLS     r1,r2,#9
000044  4801              LDR      r0,|L4.76|
000046  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
;;;29     }
00004a  bd08              POP      {r3,pc}
;;;30     
                          ENDP

;;;60       */
;;;61     void OLED_I2C_SendByte(uint8_t Byte)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;62     {

;;;63         uint8_t i;
;;;64         for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)

;;;65         {
;;;66             OLED_W_SDA(Byte & (0x80 >> i));

;;;67             OLED_W_SCL(1);
00001a  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00001c  0211              LSLS     r1,r2,#8
00001e  480c              LDR      r0,|L5.80|
000020  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
;;;68             OLED_W_SCL(0);
000024  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000026  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100
00002a  4809              LDR      r0,|L5.80|
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
000030  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;64
000032  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;64
                  |L5.52|
000034  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;64
000036  dbe7              BLT      |L5.8|
;;;69         }
;;;70         OLED_W_SCL(1);    //额外的一个时钟，不处理应答信号
000038  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00003a  0211              LSLS     r1,r2,#8
00003c  4804              LDR      r0,|L5.80|
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
;;;71         OLED_W_SCL(0);
000042  2200              MOVS     r2,#0
000044  f44f7180          MOV      r1,#0x100
000048  4801              LDR      r0,|L5.80|
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       GPIO_WriteBit
;;;72     }
00004e  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;73     
                          ENDP

                  OLED_Init PROC
;;;331      */
;;;332    void OLED_Init(void)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;333    {
;;;334        uint32_t i, j;
;;;335    
;;;336        for (i = 0; i < 1000; i++)            //上电延时
000002  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000004  e006              B        |L8.20|
                  |L8.6|
;;;337        {
;;;338            for (j = 0; j < 1000; j++);
000006  2500              MOVS     r5,#0
000008  e000              B        |L8.12|
                  |L8.10|
00000a  1c6d              ADDS     r5,r5,#1
                  |L8.12|
00000c  f5b57f7a          CMP      r5,#0x3e8
000010  d3fb              BCC      |L8.10|
000012  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1              ;336
                  |L8.20|
000014  f5b47f7a          CMP      r4,#0x3e8             ;336
000018  d3f5              BCC      |L8.6|
;;;339        }
;;;340    
;;;341        OLED_I2C_Init();            //端口初始化
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_Init
;;;342    
;;;343        OLED_WriteCommand(0xAE);    //关闭显示
00001e  20ae              MOVS     r0,#0xae
000020  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;344    
;;;345        OLED_WriteCommand(0xD5);    //设置显示时钟分频比/振荡器频率
000024  20d5              MOVS     r0,#0xd5
000026  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;346        OLED_WriteCommand(0x80);
00002a  2080              MOVS     r0,#0x80
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;347    
;;;348        OLED_WriteCommand(0xA8);    //设置多路复用率
000030  20a8              MOVS     r0,#0xa8
000032  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;349        OLED_WriteCommand(0x3F);
000036  203f              MOVS     r0,#0x3f
000038  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;350    
;;;351        OLED_WriteCommand(0xD3);    //设置显示偏移
00003c  20d3              MOVS     r0,#0xd3
00003e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;352        OLED_WriteCommand(0x00);
000042  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000044  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;353    
;;;354        OLED_WriteCommand(0x40);    //设置显示开始行
000048  2040              MOVS     r0,#0x40
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;355    
;;;356        OLED_WriteCommand(0xA1);    //设置左右方向，0xA1正常 0xA0左右反置
00004e  20a1              MOVS     r0,#0xa1
000050  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;357    
;;;358        OLED_WriteCommand(0xC8);    //设置上下方向，0xC8正常 0xC0上下反置
000054  20c8              MOVS     r0,#0xc8
000056  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;359    
;;;360        OLED_WriteCommand(0xDA);    //设置COM引脚硬件配置
00005a  20da              MOVS     r0,#0xda
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;361        OLED_WriteCommand(0x12);
000060  2012              MOVS     r0,#0x12
000062  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;362    
;;;363        OLED_WriteCommand(0x81);    //设置对比度控制
000066  2081              MOVS     r0,#0x81
000068  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;364        OLED_WriteCommand(0xCF);
00006c  20cf              MOVS     r0,#0xcf
00006e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;365    
;;;366        OLED_WriteCommand(0xD9);    //设置预充电周期
000072  20d9              MOVS     r0,#0xd9
000074  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;367        OLED_WriteCommand(0xF1);
000078  20f1              MOVS     r0,#0xf1
00007a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;368    
;;;369    
;;;370        OLED_WriteCommand(0xDB);    //设置VCOMH取消选择级别

;;;371        OLED_WriteCommand(0x30);

;;;372    
;;;373        OLED_WriteCommand(0xA4);    //设置整个显示打开/关闭

;;;374    
;;;375        OLED_WriteCommand(0xA6);    //设置正常/倒转显示

;;;377        OLED_WriteCommand(0x8D);    //设置充电泵

;;;378        OLED_WriteCommand(0x14);
00009c  2014              MOVS     r0,#0x14
00009e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;379    
;;;380        OLED_WriteCommand(0xAF);    //开启显示
0000a2  20af              MOVS     r0,#0xaf

;;;381    
;;;382        OLED_Clear();                //OLED清屏
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_Clear
;;;383    }
0000ac  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;384    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_Pow||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_Pow PROC
;;;229      */
;;;230    uint32_t OLED_Pow(uint32_t X, uint32_t Y)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;231    {
000002  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;232        uint32_t Result = 1;
000004  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;233        while (Y--)
000006  e000              B        |L9.10|
                  |L9.8|
;;;234        {
;;;235            Result *= X;
000008  4350              MULS     r0,r2,r0
                  |L9.10|
00000a  1e0b              SUBS     r3,r1,#0              ;233
00000c  f1a10101          SUB      r1,r1,#1              ;233
000010  d1fa              BNE      |L9.8|
;;;236        }
;;;237        return Result;
;;;238    }
000012  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;239    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_SetCursor||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_SetCursor PROC
;;;111      */
;;;112    void OLED_SetCursor(uint8_t Y, uint8_t X)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;113    {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;114        OLED_WriteCommand(0xB0 | Y);                    //设置Y位置
000006  f04500b0          ORR      r0,r5,#0xb0
00000a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;115        OLED_WriteCommand(0x10 | ((X & 0xF0) >> 4));    //设置X位置高4位
00000e  2110              MOVS     r1,#0x10
000010  ea411014          ORR      r0,r1,r4,LSR #4
000014  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;116        OLED_WriteCommand(0x00 | (X & 0x0F));           //设置X位置低4位
000018  f004000f          AND      r0,r4,#0xf
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteCommand
;;;117    }
000020  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;118    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowBinNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_ShowBinNum PROC
;;;317      */
;;;318    void OLED_ShowBinNum(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, uint32_t Number, uint8_t Length)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;319    {
000004  4680              MOV      r8,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
00000a  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;320        uint8_t i;
;;;321        for (i = 0; i < Length; i++)
00000c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000e  e012              B        |L11.54|
                  |L11.16|
;;;322        {
;;;323            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i, Number / OLED_Pow(2, Length - i - 1) % 2 + '0');
000010  1b28              SUBS     r0,r5,r4
000012  1e41              SUBS     r1,r0,#1
000014  2002              MOVS     r0,#2
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_Pow
00001a  fbb7f0f0          UDIV     r0,r7,r0
00001e  f0000001          AND      r0,r0,#1
000022  f1000930          ADD      r9,r0,#0x30
000026  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
000028  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
00002a  464a              MOV      r2,r9
00002c  4640              MOV      r0,r8
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
000032  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;321
000034  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;321
                  |L11.54|
000036  42ac              CMP      r4,r5                 ;321
000038  dbea              BLT      |L11.16|
;;;324        }
;;;325    }
00003a  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;326    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowChar||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  OLED_ShowChar PROC
;;;143      */
;;;144    void OLED_ShowChar(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, char Char)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;145    {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;146        uint8_t i;
;;;147        OLED_SetCursor((Line - 1) * 2, (Column - 1) * 8);        //设置光标位置在上半部分
00000a  1e72              SUBS     r2,r6,#1
00000c  06d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#27
00000e  0e11              LSRS     r1,r2,#24
000010  1e6a              SUBS     r2,r5,#1
000012  0652              LSLS     r2,r2,#25
000014  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;148        for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)
00001a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00001c  e009              B        |L12.50|
                  |L12.30|
;;;149        {
;;;150            OLED_WriteData(OLED_F8x16[Char - ' '][i]);            //显示上半部分内容
00001e  f1a70120          SUB      r1,r7,#0x20
000022  4a13              LDR      r2,|L12.112|
000024  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000028  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData
00002e  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;148
000030  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;148
                  |L12.50|
000032  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;148
000034  dbf3              BLT      |L12.30|
;;;151        }
;;;152        OLED_SetCursor((Line - 1) * 2 + 1, (Column - 1) * 8);    //设置光标位置在下半部分
000036  1e72              SUBS     r2,r6,#1
000038  06d2              LSLS     r2,r2,#27
00003a  0e11              LSRS     r1,r2,#24
00003c  1e6a              SUBS     r2,r5,#1
00003e  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
000040  eb030242          ADD      r2,r3,r2,LSL #1
000044  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000046  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;153        for (i = 0; i < 8; i++)
00004a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00004c  e00b              B        |L12.102|
                  |L12.78|
;;;154        {
;;;155            OLED_WriteData(OLED_F8x16[Char - ' '][i + 8]);        //显示下半部分内容
00004e  f1a70120          SUB      r1,r7,#0x20
000052  4a07              LDR      r2,|L12.112|
000054  eb021201          ADD      r2,r2,r1,LSL #4
000058  f1040108          ADD      r1,r4,#8
00005c  5c50              LDRB     r0,[r2,r1]
00005e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData
000062  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;153
000064  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;153
                  |L12.102|
000066  2c08              CMP      r4,#8                 ;153
000068  dbf1              BLT      |L12.78|
;;;156        }
;;;157    }
00006a  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;158    
                          ENDP

00006e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L12.112|
                          DCD      OLED_F8x16

                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowChinese||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  OLED_ShowChinese PROC
;;;165      */
;;;166    void OLED_ShowChinese(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, uint8_t num)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;167    {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;168        uint8_t i;
;;;169        OLED_SetCursor((Line - 1) * 2, (Column - 1) * 16);
00000a  1e72              SUBS     r2,r6,#1
00000c  0712              LSLS     r2,r2,#28
00000e  0e11              LSRS     r1,r2,#24
000010  1e6a              SUBS     r2,r5,#1
000012  0652              LSLS     r2,r2,#25
000014  0e10              LSRS     r0,r2,#24
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;170        for (i = 0; i < 16; i++)
00001a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00001c  e007              B        |L13.46|
                  |L13.30|
;;;171        {
;;;172            OLED_WriteData(Font_Chinese[2 * num][i]);
00001e  4a12              LDR      r2,|L13.104|
000020  eb021187          ADD      r1,r2,r7,LSL #6
000024  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
000026  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData
00002a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;170
00002c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;170
                  |L13.46|
00002e  2c10              CMP      r4,#0x10              ;170
000030  dbf5              BLT      |L13.30|
;;;173        }
;;;174        OLED_SetCursor((Line - 1) * 2 + 1, (Column - 1) * 16);
000032  1e72              SUBS     r2,r6,#1
000034  0712              LSLS     r2,r2,#28
000036  0e11              LSRS     r1,r2,#24
000038  1e6a              SUBS     r2,r5,#1
00003a  2301              MOVS     r3,#1
00003c  eb030242          ADD      r2,r3,r2,LSL #1
000040  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2
000042  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_SetCursor
;;;175        for (i = 0; i < 16; i++)
000046  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
000048  e009              B        |L13.94|
                  |L13.74|
;;;176        {
;;;177            OLED_WriteData(Font_Chinese[2 * num + 1][i]);
00004a  0079              LSLS     r1,r7,#1
00004c  1c49              ADDS     r1,r1,#1
00004e  4a06              LDR      r2,|L13.104|
000050  eb021141          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #5
000054  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
000056  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_WriteData
00005a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;175
00005c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;175
                  |L13.94|
00005e  2c10              CMP      r4,#0x10              ;175
000060  dbf3              BLT      |L13.74|
;;;178        }
;;;179    }
000062  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;180    
                          ENDP

000066  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L13.104|
                          DCD      Font_Chinese

                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowHexNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_ShowHexNum PROC
;;;292      */
;;;293    void OLED_ShowHexNum(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, uint32_t Number, uint8_t Length)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;294    {
000004  4681              MOV      r9,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4690              MOV      r8,r2
00000a  461f              MOV      r7,r3
;;;295        uint8_t i, SingleNumber;
;;;296        for (i = 0; i < Length; i++)
00000c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000e  e01d              B        |L14.76|
                  |L14.16|
;;;297        {
;;;298            SingleNumber = Number / OLED_Pow(16, Length - i - 1) % 16;
000010  1b38              SUBS     r0,r7,r4
000012  1e41              SUBS     r1,r0,#1
000014  2010              MOVS     r0,#0x10
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_Pow
00001a  fbb8f0f0          UDIV     r0,r8,r0
00001e  f000050f          AND      r5,r0,#0xf
;;;299            if (SingleNumber < 10)
000022  2d0a              CMP      r5,#0xa
000024  da08              BGE      |L14.56|
;;;300            {
;;;301                OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i, SingleNumber + '0');
000026  f1050030          ADD      r0,r5,#0x30
00002a  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
00002c  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
00002e  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000030  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000032  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
000036  e007              B        |L14.72|
                  |L14.56|
;;;302            }
;;;303            else
;;;304            {
;;;305                OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i, SingleNumber - 10 + 'A');
000038  f1050037          ADD      r0,r5,#0x37
00003c  b2c2              UXTB     r2,r0
00003e  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
000040  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000042  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000044  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
                  |L14.72|
000048  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;296
00004a  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;296
                  |L14.76|
00004c  42bc              CMP      r4,r7                 ;296
00004e  dbdf              BLT      |L14.16|
;;;306            }
;;;307        }
;;;308    }
000050  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;309    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_ShowNum PROC
;;;247      */
;;;248    void OLED_ShowNum(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, uint32_t Number, uint8_t Length)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;249    {
000004  4680              MOV      r8,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
00000a  461d              MOV      r5,r3
;;;250        uint8_t i;
;;;251        for (i = 0; i < Length; i++)
00000c  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000e  e015              B        |L15.60|
                  |L15.16|
;;;252        {
;;;253            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i, Number / OLED_Pow(10, Length - i - 1) % 10 + '0');
000010  1b28              SUBS     r0,r5,r4
000012  1e41              SUBS     r1,r0,#1
000014  200a              MOVS     r0,#0xa
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_Pow
00001a  fbb7f0f0          UDIV     r0,r7,r0
00001e  210a              MOVS     r1,#0xa
000020  fbb0f2f1          UDIV     r2,r0,r1
000024  fb010012          MLS      r0,r1,r2,r0
000028  f1000930          ADD      r9,r0,#0x30
00002c  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
00002e  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000030  464a              MOV      r2,r9
000032  4640              MOV      r0,r8
000034  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
000038  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;251
00003a  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;251
                  |L15.60|
00003c  42ac              CMP      r4,r5                 ;251
00003e  dbe7              BLT      |L15.16|
;;;254        }
;;;255    }
000040  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;256    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowSignedNum||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_ShowSignedNum PROC
;;;264      */
;;;265    void OLED_ShowSignedNum(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, int32_t Number, uint8_t Length)
000000  e92d47f0          PUSH     {r4-r10,lr}
;;;266    {
000004  4681              MOV      r9,r0
000006  4688              MOV      r8,r1
000008  4615              MOV      r5,r2
00000a  461e              MOV      r6,r3
;;;267        uint8_t i;
;;;268        uint32_t Number1;
;;;269        if (Number >= 0)
00000c  2d00              CMP      r5,#0
00000e  db06              BLT      |L16.30|
;;;270        {
;;;271            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column, '+');
000010  222b              MOVS     r2,#0x2b
000012  4641              MOV      r1,r8
000014  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
;;;272            Number1 = Number;
00001a  462f              MOV      r7,r5
00001c  e005              B        |L16.42|
                  |L16.30|
;;;273        }
;;;274        else
;;;275        {
;;;276            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column, '-');
00001e  222d              MOVS     r2,#0x2d
000020  4641              MOV      r1,r8
000022  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000024  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
;;;277            Number1 = -Number;
000028  426f              RSBS     r7,r5,#0
                  |L16.42|
;;;278        }
;;;279        for (i = 0; i < Length; i++)
00002a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00002c  e017              B        |L16.94|
                  |L16.46|
;;;280        {
;;;281            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i + 1, Number1 / OLED_Pow(10, Length - i - 1) % 10 + '0');
00002e  1b30              SUBS     r0,r6,r4
000030  1e41              SUBS     r1,r0,#1
000032  200a              MOVS     r0,#0xa
000034  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_Pow
000038  fbb7f0f0          UDIV     r0,r7,r0
00003c  210a              MOVS     r1,#0xa
00003e  fbb0f2f1          UDIV     r2,r0,r1
000042  fb010012          MLS      r0,r1,r2,r0
000046  f1000a30          ADD      r10,r0,#0x30
00004a  eb080004          ADD      r0,r8,r4
00004e  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1
000050  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000052  4652              MOV      r2,r10
000054  4648              MOV      r0,r9
000056  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
00005a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;279
00005c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;279
                  |L16.94|
00005e  42b4              CMP      r4,r6                 ;279
000060  dbe5              BLT      |L16.46|
;;;282        }
;;;283    }
000062  e8bd87f0          POP      {r4-r10,pc}
;;;284    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_ShowString||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_ShowString PROC
;;;216      */
;;;217    void OLED_ShowString(uint8_t Line, uint8_t Column, char *String)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;218    {
000004  4607              MOV      r7,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4615              MOV      r5,r2
;;;219        uint8_t i;
;;;220        for (i = 0; String[i] != '\0'; i++)
00000a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00000c  e007              B        |L17.30|
                  |L17.14|
;;;221        {
;;;222            OLED_ShowChar(Line, Column + i, String[i]);
00000e  5d2a              LDRB     r2,[r5,r4]
000010  1930              ADDS     r0,r6,r4
000012  b2c1              UXTB     r1,r0
000014  4638              MOV      r0,r7
000016  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_ShowChar
00001a  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;220
00001c  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;220
                  |L17.30|
00001e  5d28              LDRB     r0,[r5,r4]            ;220
000020  2800              CMP      r0,#0                 ;220
000022  d1f4              BNE      |L17.14|
;;;223        }
;;;224    }
000024  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;225    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_WriteCommand||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_WriteCommand PROC
;;;78       */
;;;79     void OLED_WriteCommand(uint8_t Command)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;80     {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;81         taskENTER_CRITICAL();
000004  f7fffffe          BL       vPortEnterCritical
;;;82         OLED_I2C_Start();
000008  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_Start
;;;83         OLED_I2C_SendByte(0x78);        //从机地址
00000c  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;84         OLED_I2C_SendByte(0x00);        //写命令
000012  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000014  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;85         OLED_I2C_SendByte(Command);
000018  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;86         OLED_I2C_Stop();
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_Stop
;;;87         taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;88     }
000026  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;89     
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.OLED_WriteData||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  OLED_WriteData PROC
;;;94       */
;;;95     void OLED_WriteData(uint8_t Data)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;96     {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;97         taskENTER_CRITICAL();
000004  f7fffffe          BL       vPortEnterCritical
;;;98         OLED_I2C_Start();
000008  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_Start
;;;99         OLED_I2C_SendByte(0x78);        //从机地址
00000c  2078              MOVS     r0,#0x78
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;100        OLED_I2C_SendByte(0x40);        //写数据
000012  2040              MOVS     r0,#0x40
000014  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;101        OLED_I2C_SendByte(Data);
000018  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001a  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_SendByte
;;;102        OLED_I2C_Stop();
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       OLED_I2C_Stop
;;;103        taskEXIT_CRITICAL();
000022  f7fffffe          BL       vPortExitCritical
;;;104    }
000026  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;105    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||.constdata||, DATA, READONLY, ALIGN=0

                  OLED_F8x16
000000  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
000004  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
000008  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
00000c  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
000010  000000f8          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0xf8
000014  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
000018  00000033          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x33
00001c  30000000          DCB      0x30,0x00,0x00,0x00
000020  00100c06          DCB      0x00,0x10,0x0c,0x06
000024  100c0600          DCB      0x10,0x0c,0x06,0x00
000028  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
00002c  00000000          DCB      0x00,0x00,0x00,0x00
